# Ilya Lebedev

> Senior software engineer with 8+ years building and scaling production SaaS systems end-to-end. Ex-founder (Techstars Web3 '25): built and scaled an infrastructure-heavy platform to 18k+ users and 25k+ deployed nodes. Fluent across Ruby, Python and JavaScript on APIs, background workers, data pipelines and integrations; hands-on with LLM orchestration, RAG pipelines and AI coding tools, and happy to pick up any stack. Remote (US/EU time zones), B2B contract; open to senior fullstack contract work and technical co-founder conversations.

## CV variants

- [General CV](https://ilyalebe.dev/cv): Full timeline of experience, education, programs, and selected projects.
- [Fullstack CV](https://ilyalebe.dev/cv_fullstack): Senior Fullstack Engineer focus (Ruby on Rails, Hotwire, React).
- [Backend CV](https://ilyalebe.dev/cv_backend): Senior Backend Engineer focus.
- [PM CV](https://ilyalebe.dev/cv_pm): Product/PM angle on the same career.

## Selected projects

- [SupportOS](https://supportos.ilyalebe.dev/): Agentic customer support system prototype. Rails, SQLite, Rubyllm, Kamal.
- [slack-llm-bot](https://github.com/lebedevilya/slack-llm-bot): Production-shaped Slack bot on Vercel. OpenAI tool-loop, threaded memory, optional Supabase pgvector long-term recall, and an offline eval harness with deterministic oracle + LLM judge. TypeScript, MIT-licensed.
- [nodes.garden](https://backdropbuild.com/builds/nodesgarden): Web3/AI Node-as-a-Service platform. 25k+ deployed nodes, 18k+ users, Techstars Web3 '25 cohort. Rails, PostgreSQL, GoodJob, Docker, Fly.io.
- [customs.codes](https://backdropbuild.com/builds/v3/customscodes): RAG-based AI search tool for customs codes. Backdrop Build V3 finalist. Discontinued. Rails, PostgreSQL.
- [xometry.de](https://xometry.de): Manufacturing marketplace. Built async intercompany systems and regional apps as an employed engineer. Rails, PostgreSQL, React, GraphQL, RabbitMQ.

## Profiles and contact

- [Contact](https://ilyalebe.dev/contact): How to reach Ilya. Primary CTA is a 30-minute Calendly booking; other channels are LinkedIn DM, Telegram, and GitHub.
- [Book a call](https://calendly.com/ilya0lebedev/30min): 30-minute Calendly slot for project work, hiring, or co-founder conversations.
- [Homepage](https://ilyalebe.dev): Bio, project highlights, and links to everything else.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/lebedevilya): Public code and profile README.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ilya-lebedev-554225102/): Professional network.

## Skills

- Languages: Ruby, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Solidity.
- Backend: Ruby on Rails, REST and GraphQL APIs, domain modeling.
- Frontend: Hotwire (Turbo + Stimulus), React, Vue, ViewComponent, TailwindCSS.
- LLM and AI: OpenAI tool-loop, RAG pipelines, embeddings, pgvector, eval harnesses with deterministic oracle + LLM judge.
- Web3: Solidity, ERC-721, Foundry, OpenZeppelin, ethers.js, JSON-RPC, Arbitrum.
- Data: PostgreSQL, Redis, SQLite.
- Async: Sidekiq, GoodJob, SolidQueue, RabbitMQ.
- Infra: Docker, CI/CD, AWS, GCP, fly.io, Heroku, Vercel, Kamal.
- Observability: Datadog, Sentry, Appsignal.

## Optional

- [Travel](https://ilyalebe.dev/travel): Countries visited (digital nomad context).
